name: Infinitrack Harvester
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>限</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ハーヴェスター
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Infinitrack" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Infinitrack Harvester". You can target 1 other Machine monster you control; the Levels of both that monster and this card become the combined original Levels of those 2 monsters, until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Harvester" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Infinitrack" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Infinitrack Harvester". You can target 1 other Machine monster you control; the Levels of both that monster and this card become the combined original Levels of those 2 monsters, until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Harvester" once per turn.
